text: Recommended cash offer (scheme) of 506p per share for all shares in Rotork by ABB Automation Holding UK Limited, a subsidiary of ABB Ltd
Recommended cash offer of £1,230p per share for G&H by  Greenlight Bidco Limited, an acquisition vehicle owned by Arlington Capital Partners VII, L.P.
AEW UK REIT plc is considering an offer to acquire AIRE for 0.725 AEWU shares for each AIRE share
Final recommended cash offer (scheme) for Ramsdens of 675p per share
Extension of PUSU deadline to 16 July 2026
